
### EVICT+RELOAD  {.smaller}



* PRIME+PROBE: fill cache, detect eviction
* alternate idea [EVICT]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only}+[RELOAD]{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}:
 
<pre><code>unsigned char *probe_array;
posix_memalign(&amp;probe_array, CACHE_SIZE, CACHE_SIZE);
<span data-fragment-index="0" class="fragment custom myem-only">access OTHER things to evict all of probe_array</span>
if (something false) {
    read probe_array\[mystery * BLOCK_SIZE];
}
<span data-fragment-index="1" class="fragment custom myem-only">check which value from probe_array is faster</span>
</code></pre>
 

* requires code to access something you can access
* but often easier to setup/more reliable than PRIME+PROBE
